narratives.Overview: DeftConsensus is a Consensus-as-Code platform. The Phase 1 frontend implements a two-pane brief/chat feature workspace with immutable original briefs, governed AI-assisted in-progress updates, section-level voting, parent/subfeature decomposition, and fork suggestions -- all backed by centralized typed mock data.
narratives.TechStack: Web app built on Next.js 15 (App Router) + React 19 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS, styled with the @deftai/deft-components shadcn-based design system. Testing via Vitest + Testing Library. Project framework: Deft Directive v0.20 (vBRIEF document model).
narratives.Strategy: Use discuss for this project (per USER.md default). Brief-change proposals are aligned in context before implementation.
narratives.Quality: Run `task check` before every commit. Target >= 85% test coverage overall and per-module. Keep secrets in a `secrets/` directory; do not commit them. Run `npm run lint && npm test && npm run build` as an explicit quality gate before opening a PR.
narratives.ProjectRules: (1) Phase 1 is frontend-only -- do NOT add live integrations (APIs, servers, databases, auth providers, external services); use mock data exclusively. (2) All mock data MUST live in a centralized module (`src/mocks/`). (3) Styling MUST use the @deftai/deft-components design tokens (shadcn-style HSL vars) -- avoid hard-coded visual values without explicit justification. (4) Before implementing a new Phase 1 route/page, produce a page spec covering: route path + name, page goal and primary action, required sections/components, navigation entry/exit, UI states (default/loading/empty/error), required mock data shape, responsive behavior, and accessibility expectations. (5) Rendered docs at the repo root (`PROJECT.md`, `SPECIFICATION.md`, `PRD.md`, `ROADMAP.md`) are machine-generated -- edit the `vbrief/` sources and run the matching `task *:render` command instead. (6) Historical decision-context artifacts live under `docs/discussions/`.
narratives.Branching: Branch-based workflow (default). Commit to feature branches; open PRs against master.
